Added_Other.mechanism: Reloads chat messages when a trusted connection is established.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures players see the latest chat messages quickly and reliably.

Added_Graphics.name: FFlagTexturePacksFallbackReferenceManaged_Staged
Added_Graphics.mechanism: Allows texture packs to use a fallback system when the main textures are unavailable.
Added_Graphics.purpose: Ensures players still see textures even if the primary ones fail to load.

Added_Graphics.name: FFlagTexturePriorityBasedOnDistance_Staged
Added_Graphics.mechanism: Adjusts how textures are loaded based on their distance from the player.
Added_Graphics.purpose: Improves performance and visual quality by loading higher quality textures for nearby objects.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a dynamic string representing the current Git hash of the repository.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers track changes and versions of their game assets.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Adjusts how timestamps are formatted in dynamic strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves readability of time-related information in games.

Changed_Other.name: FFlagExplorerStreaming3
Changed_Other.mechanism: Implements a new streaming method for the Explorer tool.
Changed_Other.purpose: Players can navigate and manage their game assets more efficiently.

Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances performance by speeding up version checks for players.
